title: gh#62: R2.2 — Add planDelete; switch api/post.service.deletePost
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/62.
Backlog section: Candidate 2 — Post Lifecycle aggregate.

## Context

Second PR in Candidate 2. Migrates `deletePost` to the aggregate.

## Scope

- Add `planDelete(currentRow: PostState): void` to `packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts`
  - Throws `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'not_deletable' })` if status is not in `DELETABLE_STATES`
  - Returns `void` (no patch — deletion is a row removal, handled by the repo)
- Update `packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts` → `deletePost`:
  - Call `planDelete(loadedRow)` inside the transaction before the actual DELETE
  - Soft-delete of media still happens in the service (out of aggregate scope per ADR-0003)
- Unit tests for `planDelete`: each `DELETABLE_STATES` value passes; each non-deletable state throws with correct `kind`

## Out of scope

- `planTransitionToPublishing` (R2.3)
- `planRecordSuccess` / `planRecordFailure` (R2.4)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/api build` and test pass
- Existing `deletePost` tests pass

## References

- ADRs: [0003](../blob/main/docs/adr/0003-post-lifecycle-is-pure-functions-not-shared-repository.md), [0004](../blob/main/docs/adr/0004-publish-cycle-orchestration-stays-in-the-worker.md)
- Depends on: #61

history.reasoning: The original evidence paths still exist. Current packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts contains only planUpdate and deriveEffectiveScheduledAt (lines 1-99) and no planDelete; rg found no planDelete symbol anywhere in the repo. packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts still imports DELETABLE_STATES directly from @sms/shared and deletePost still enforces deletability inline in the DELETE WHERE clause with inArray(posts.status, [...DELETABLE_STATES]) at lines 316-324, with no loaded row passed to an aggregate planner. packages/shared/src/__tests__/post-aggregate.test.ts imports/tests planUpdate only and has no planDelete coverage. A targeted vitest run could not execute because the read-only sandbox blocked Vitest from writing packages/shared/node_modules/.vite-temp, but the current code and test sources show the requested migration and regression tests are still absent.
commands: git status --short && rg -n "planDelete|deletePost|DELETABLE_STATES|not_deletable" packages/shared/src/post packages/api/src/services packages -g '*.{ts,tsx}'

history.reasoning: The original evidence paths still exist, and the current code now implements the requested migration. packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts defines planDelete(currentRow: PostState): void at lines 10-17, checks DELETABLE_STATES, throws PostInvariantError with kind 'not_deletable', and returns no patch. packages/shared/src/post/errors.ts includes the not_deletable kind, and packages/shared/src/index.ts re-exports the aggregate. packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts now imports planDelete, loads the current post row inside deletePost's transaction, calls planDelete before soft-deleting media and before the DELETE, maps PostInvariantError to PostServiceError, and no longer uses the previous direct DELETABLE_STATES DELETE predicate. packages/shared/src/__tests__/post-aggregate.test.ts has focused planDelete tests for every DELETABLE_STATES value and every non-deletable POST_STATUSES value. I could not run the normal build/test commands because this revalidation environment is read-only and Vitest/tsc tried to write cache/dist files, but no-emit TypeScript checks passed for both @sms/shared and @sms/api.
